About the Archbishop

Stephen Cottrell is the 98th Archbishop of York. Serving the Diocese of York and the dioceses of the Northern Province of the Church of England.

Meet Stephen Cottrell

Discover more about the 98th Archbishop of York, The Most Reverend Stephen Cottrell.

The Archbishop’s team

The Archbishop is supported by a dedicated team of advisers, administrators and clerical, technical and maintenance staff at...

Previous Archbishops of York

Stephen Cottrell is the 98th Archbishop of York to have served the church in the Northern Province.

Ministry and role of the Archbishop

The Northern Province

The provinces of Canterbury and York reflect the beginnings of the structure of the Church of England

The Anglican Communion

The Archbishop is one of the Primates of the Anglican Communion representing the Church of England internationally.

Diocese of York

An overview of the Archbishop's work and ministry in the Diocese of York.

York Minster

York Minster is the seat of the Archbishop of York and the cathedral church of the Diocese and Province of York.

Patronages

Archbishop Stephen is patron to a number of charitable organisations, locally, nationally and internationally.

Explore further

Publications

Stephen Cottrell has written more than 20 books on subjects such as evangelism, spirituality, and discipleship, as well as...

Photographs of Archbishop Stephen Cottrell

Download high-resolution images of Archbishop Stephen Cottrell to use for publication.

Prayer for the Day

Sunday, 3 May 2026
The Fifth Sunday of Easter

Risen Christ,
your wounds declare your love for the world
and the wonder of your risen life:
give us compassion and courage
to risk ourselves for those we serve,
to the glory of God the Father.
Amen.

Get more prayer resources

Everyday Faith

Get the daily devotional app from the Church of England designed to inspire, equip and encourage you in your faith every day of the week.

Download the app

Safeguarding

The Church of England is committed to safeguarding as an integral part of its ministry and mission, promoting a safer culture and the welfare of every child, young person and adult.

Find safeguarding resources
